title: BOLSIUS Champagne Rustic Shimmer Metallic Pillar Candle 19cm x 7cm
description: About Bolsius Pillar Candles This new rustic candle range from Bolsius is inspired by the colors and textures of nature. Free from palm oil or animal fat, they’re made with a plant based wax and a cotton wick. On top of that, these new renewed rustic candles now burns even longer. With a large flame and soft light, these Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candles bring atmosphere to any environment. Size: 19cm x 6.8cm Fragrance: Unscented
